description: Generate game-ready 3D models, images, and animations. Multi-engine, one API.
name: io.github.UModeler/picoberry-mcp

environmentVariables.description: PicoBerry API key (pb_live_...). Create one at https://picoberry.ai/dashboard/api-keys. Requires a completed purchase (a subscription or a one-off credit pack) or an active paid subscription.
environmentVariables.name: PICOBERRY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://api.picoberry.ai — leave unset unless you were given a different host.
environmentVariables.name: PICOBERRY_API_BASE

title: PicoBerry
